intervals.name: Warmup
intervals.purpose: Prepare system and elevate heart rate

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 10:00 at 75%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 0% complete. Rep 1/1. 75% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 75% for 10:00. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 75% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 75% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Relax. Breathe. Enjoy the ride. 60:00 of engine-building.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 60:00 at 68%. This should feel easy. If breathing hard, you're going too hard.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Easy miles = fast racing. 68% for 60:00. Trust the process.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 60:00 at 68%. The pace where you can contemplate life's mysteries. Like why you own a bike.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Stay patient. Stay easy. 68% for 60:00. Trust the process.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 2/3. 60% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 2. 60min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 70 minutes of work done. 30 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 2/3. 70 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 1 reps left.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 73% done. 0 intervals left. 25 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 73% complete. Rep 1/1. 55% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 73% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 73% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. 55% FTP × 5:00. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final interval. 90% for 15:00. Then 10min cooldown. Leave nothing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final interval: 90% × 15:00. Then 10min easy. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 15:00 at 90%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final interval. 90% for 15:00. Then 10min to question life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 90% × 15:00. Seated, 75-85 rpm. Finish what you started.

intervals.name: Cool-down
intervals.purpose: Gradually lower heart rate and begin recovery

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 105 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 60% FTP, 85-95 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 105 minutes of work done. 0 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 105 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 91% into session. 60%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.
